headline: SPECTRUM BUSINESS EXPANDS TECHNOLOGY OFFERINGS FOR CALIFORNIA STATE AGENCIES THROUGH CALNET CONTRACT
summary: Spectrum Business has announced the addition of Managed Network Services to its portfolio of technology solutions available to state and local government agencies under the California Network and Telecommunications (CALNET) contract, which is administered by the California Department of Technology.
